summary: Doctrine Forge Codex is a preserved project packet for a handoff-ready state packet for an ongoing project: create 1,000 distinct doctrine-level foreign-policy paradigms of "containment/Kennan/Kissinger-class" explanatory and strategic power.
final_use_case: It preserves the distinctive design logic for Doctrine Forge Codex, so the portfolio can show the actual mechanism and status instead of reducing the project to a file-count or handoff label.
